text.message: Let's stop a losing streak before work, shall we
We don’t want black to be happy
It is certainly up to you
We can get others over there
Love that feeling of regret on the first orbit
I got a road for you red
Dw black. It’s us against white
dang why are u guys colluding so hard
What does red actually do here
btw we actually forgetting about blue here
Sorry red I'm sick of this abuse
Yeah find someone else to rob
All of those robs really stunted 3rd place
Who are you talking to lol
uh im the one robbed the most tho..
Do you know how many robs I ate to get you there?
Blue if I can get some wood I can fight road maybe
either white or blue have mono
They could be buried. Either way it wouldn't stop your win
i mean u could take road too white
wow i was expecting a mono
Just roll 4 ore every other roll
That's a bad block I think
yeah didnt expect 11 to cook this much
i think u have it white
so cant complain if u got rob
u didnt use ur dev since forever
yepp u guys got all the vp
u have plenty of chance to mono ore
i still got a ton of ore
Terrible devs for me lol I should’ve won
white been lying too much lol
i got knights haha, will use it this turn
Or maybe it's neither of us
Some games you just don’t build a single road
Great when your 11th dev is the rb you needed all game
8 knights is unlucky tho red, respect yo you
Dang does black just take road
no way i can take road back now
You have two roads in hand a three or a ten might do
unless 8 and 10 rolls in a row
